# James Floyd

> Builder, creator, entrepreneur, intrapreneur, speaker, event producer, connector.

## About

James Floyd is an entrepreneur, intrapreneur, and builder based in the United States. He has 7+ years of experience building lean teams, high-performance sales organizations, and executing as Chief of Staff to industry leaders. He operates at the intersection of people, ideas, and conviction — connecting, creating, and living with intention.

Website: https://jamesworld.lovable.app
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamesfloydl/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jamesfloydsworld
Email: jamesfloydbiz@gmail.com

## FAQ

### Who is James Floyd?
James Floyd is an entrepreneur, intrapreneur, speaker, event producer, and connector. He has worked as Chief of Staff at BetterWealth and Keiretsu Forum, runs operations for Jets and Capital events, and builds AI automation tools. He has traveled to 15+ countries, speaks fluent Spanish, and has written 90+ poems. He is known for translating chaos into structure, scaling brands through AI and systems, and driving dealflow.

### What does James Floyd do?
James Floyd builds teams, produces events, creates AI automations, and connects people. He has served as Chief of Staff, led sales organizations, and executed operations for high-profile events with cumulative AUM in the room of $400B to $2+ trillion. He builds outcomes — from funnels to large-scale events — and moves fast, leads well, and delivers consistently.

### What events has James Floyd produced?
James Floyd has produced and supported events for Jets and Capital at venues including Trump Doral Miami, Caesars Palace, The Intrepid Aircraft Carrier, and private jet hangars. He has led event operations for Keiretsu Forum with 900+ attendees. He has organized events around the United States for thousands of people, working with high-profile individuals and companies.

### Is James Floyd available for speaking?
Yes. James Floyd is available for speaking engagements on topics including entrepreneurship, intrapreneurship, event production, AI automation, networking, sales leadership, and building from nothing. Contact him at jamesfloydbiz@gmail.com or connect on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/jamesfloydl.

### What AI tools does James Floyd build?
James Floyd builds AI agents and automation workflows including: a network automation agent (an AI that chats with contacts, saves their info, and emails introduction suggestions), a multi-agent blog team for SEO-optimized content, a YouTube-to-blog converter, a top YouTube videos research tool, an organic YouTube-to-calls-booked dashboard, and AI-coded calculators. He uses tools like N8N, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. He also built JamesFloyds.World — a 3D interactive portfolio environment.

### How do I connect with James Floyd?
Email: jamesfloydbiz@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamesfloydl/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jamesfloydsworld
Website: https://jamesworld.lovable.app

### What is James Floyd's experience?
- Chief of Staff at BetterWealth (Nov 2024 – Dec 2025): Doubled conversion rate, built a podcast studio generating 100k+ views, streamlined content production with AI agents saving 30+ hours per week.
- Operations at Jets and Capital (Sep 2023 – Present): Event production at high-profile venues with cumulative AUM in the room of $400B to $2+ trillion.
- Chief of Staff at Keiretsu Forum NW, Keiretsu Capital, NW Angel Fund (Nov 2023 – Jun 2024): Supported the largest angel investor community in the world with $1B+ deployed, led teams for 900+ attendee events, analyzed 1000+ startup pitches.
- Account Executive at Royal Management (Jul 2021 – Jul 2022): Led the nation in sales, broke records, recruited and managed teams of 5-30 members.

### Where has James Floyd worked?
James Floyd has worked with BetterWealth, Jets and Capital, Keiretsu Forum, Royal Management, Loeb NYC, Blue Devil, Jacob Green Charity Golf, Champions of Change, Seattle Sounders, and the Seahawks. He has operated across cities including San Diego, New York, Los Angeles, Miami, San Francisco, Chicago, Austin, Palm Beach, Vancouver, Singapore, Hong Kong, Tokyo, and Bangkok.

### What is JamesFloyds.World?
JamesFloyds.World is James Floyd's interactive digital environment — not a traditional website but a place designed for exploration. It includes a 3D museum gallery, a newspaper-style portfolio, a personal story timeline, AI builds showcase, poetry collection, photo memories, resume, references, and more. It communicates identity through presence and structure, favoring discovery over explanation.

### What are James Floyd's skills?
AI Agents, Prompt Engineering, Automations, N8N, Event Production, Scaling Sales Teams, Analytics, Funnel Design, SEO, CRM, Sales, Partnerships, GSuite, HubSpot, Webflow, Typeform, Figma, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude.

### What are James Floyd's key achievements?
- Broke the record of products sold in one day multiple times
- Led a website and SEO overhaul resulting in a 64-point increase in site health, 19.1% site-view-to-call conversion, and Google rank increase from 57 to 21 in 2 months
- Consistently facilitates connections for $500M+ deals, startup financing, and more
- Built AI content systems generating 100k+ views and saving 30+ hours per week
- Produced events with cumulative AUM of $400B to $2+ trillion in the room
